query: Provide a comprehensive, compact report on the best ways for an intermediate US investor with $1M to maximize returns via stocks, tech (AI/ML, ETFs, VC), real estate (REITs, direct, crowdfunding), and diversified portfolios in 2026. Cover short-term (up to 3 years) and long-term (up to 10 years) horizons with mixed risk tolerance (balanced shares in index funds/dividends/bonds; aggressive in growth tech/startups/private RE). Include historical/benchmark data (2010-2026 returns, volatility, Sharpe), model portfolios (50/50 splits with projections/Monte Carlo), tax strategies (1031, opp zones), pros/cons, visuals (charts for CAGR/drawdowns), cutting-edge ops (green RE, private credit), and actionable steps with risk-adjusted performance.
